allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); "--- Remote commits we are missing ---"; git log --oneline HEAD..origin/main; "--- Files changed on remote vs our base ---"; git diff --name-only HEAD...origin/main)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); python -m venv .venv-test 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; & .venv-test\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install pytest --quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); & .venv-test\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install ruff --quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; & .venv-test\\Scripts\\python.exe -m ruff check scripts/provision_blob_storage.py tests/scripts/test_provision_blob_storage.py)
PowerShell($out = & powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\setup-windows.ps1 -UseBlueprint dummy 2>&1; "Exit code: $LASTEXITCODE"; $out | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $bash = 'C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe'; & $bash -n scripts/setup.sh; "setup.sh: $LASTEXITCODE"; try { $null = [scriptblock]::Create\(\(Get-Content -Raw 'scripts\\setup-windows.ps1'\)\); "setup-windows.ps1: OK" } catch { "setup-windows.ps1: FAIL -- $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); $bash = 'C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe'; & $bash -n scripts/setup.sh; "setup.sh: $LASTEXITCODE"; try { $null = [scriptblock]::Create\(\(Get-Content -Raw 'scripts\\setup-windows.ps1'\)\); "setup-windows.ps1: OK" } catch { "setup-windows.ps1: FAIL -- $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; & .venv-test\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/scripts/test_provision_blob_storage.py --tb=short 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)
